title: 3.27.0c Hotfix
changes: Fixed a bug introduced in 3.27.0c where currencies in storage within areas, such as Syndicate Crafting Bench or the Corruption Altar, were unusable.
You will need to restart your client to receive the client fix, as well as enter a new instance of the area.
